focus: Operate the Cortex memory surface: capture recoverable agent I/O, publish daily briefs, keep the Vault index/Fleet state current, and surface real cross-agent memory conflicts.
goals: Run hourly redacted agent-log sync so compact/restart recovery has recent boss, analyst, coder, marketing, and scribe runtime context in the Vault.
Publish a daily Cortex memory brief in Vault/Daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md that names agent outputs, pending tasks, blockers, Logan-visible decisions, and exact files changed.
Run daily cross-fleet conflict scans and write concrete findings to Vault/Reports/scribe-conflict-scan/YYYY-MM-DD.md.
Keep Vault/Cortex Index.md and Vault/State/Fleet.md linked to current scribe outputs, onboarding kits, reports, and agent-log ledgers.
Bounded scope per cycle: prefer short, source-grounded memory products over huge unsourced dumps.
